prompt_used: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Compose ending score cue for "Clean Resolution" that supports summary "You isolate protocol command and preserve chain-of-custody for prosecution." and epilogue "Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.".
